safe_to_use_for: testing Evidence Pack v1 traceability on a TWIS article draft
not_safe_to_use_for: proving policy outcomes without external sources
publishing a full TWIS article evidence pack without further checking
limits: no fact-checking of policy claims beyond article-framing level

safe_to_use_for: showing that household cost pressures can be checked against official statistics
supporting the article method that political language should be tested against material conditions
not_safe_to_use_for: proving a politician intended to mislead
proving all material conditions mentioned in the article
proving the full article is publication-ready
limits: does not cover wages, housing supply, transport quality, workplace power, or public service performance
